headline: Carrier (CARR) Stock Looks Fully Priced As Focus Shifts After Riello Sale
summary: Carrier Global stock sits at an interesting crossroads: the Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) intrinsic value estimate points to meaningful upside relative to the current US$70.07 share price, while earnings based multiples suggest the stock is priced on the rich side. Over the past 5 years Carrier Global has returned about 55%, which puts the recent share price in the context of a solid longer term gain even though the last year has been weaker. The recent completion of the Riello sale may support...

headline: Carrier (CARR) Completes Riello Sale As It Tightens Focus On Climate And Energy
summary: Carrier Global has completed the sale of its Riello business to Ariston Group. The transaction is part of Carrier Global's ongoing portfolio realignment around core climate and energy solutions. The deal marks another step in Carrier Global's plan to redeploy capital into its primary business areas. Carrier Global, NYSE:CARR, is sharpening its focus after closing the Riello sale, with investors now weighing what this means for the core climate and energy platform. The stock trades around...
